items.title: 'Canadians are with you,' says PM at Tumbler Ridge vigil
items.dek: The Canadian prime minister attended a vigil with federal leaders and paid tribute to the eight victims.
items.body: The Canadian prime minister attended a vigil with federal leaders and paid tribute to the eight victims.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: US homeland security shutdown could mean airport delays, travel groups say
items.dek: The shutdown won't affect air traffic controllers but some TSA workers may go without pay.
items.body: The shutdown won't affect air traffic controllers but some TSA workers may go without pay.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Oil refinery ablaze in Cuba as fuel crisis deepens
items.dek: The fire, which Cuban officials say was contained quickly, comes as electricity and fuel supplies dwindle.
items.body: The fire, which Cuban officials say was contained quickly, comes as electricity and fuel supplies dwindle.
items.author: IriLine Desk
